hero.title: Smart Money Management
hero.subtitle: Your friendly financial companion for tracking expenses, managing budgets, and achieving your savings goals.

trusted.rating: Rated 4.8★ on App Store & Play Store

problem_solution.title: Why Managing Money is Hard
problem_solution.problem_desc: Forgetting to log daily expenses, guessing monthly budget limits, and trying to manage joint finances with partners using messy spreadsheets.
problem_solution.solution_desc: A unified platform featuring instant logging, real-time budget alarms, your personal AI financial assistant, and shared rooms to manage money together in real-time.

features.title: Core Features
features.f1_desc: Easily record every penny going in and out.
features.f2_desc: Set monthly limits and get warned before you overspend.
features.f3_desc: Get personalized financial insights directly from Buddy.

ai_assistant.title: Meet Buddy: Your AI Financial Assistant
ai_assistant.subtitle: Get instant answers to any financial questions and receive proactive advice to optimize your savings.
ai_assistant.chat_q1: How much did I spend on coffee this month?
ai_assistant.chat_a1: You spent Rp 350,000 on coffee. That is 15% less than last month! Keep it up!
ai_assistant.chat_q2: How can I save for a new laptop faster?
ai_assistant.chat_a2: Based on your budget, if you reduce dining out by 20%, you can reach your Rp 10,000,000 goal 2 months earlier!

security.title: Bank-Grade Security & Absolute Privacy
security.subtitle: Your financial records are strictly yours. We protect them with advanced cryptographic protocols.
security.f1_desc: All data transferred is encrypted using 256-bit SSL protocols.
security.f2_desc: Never lose your history. Secure backups are generated automatically.
security.f3_desc: We never sell or share your transaction data with third parties.

shared_finance.title: Shared Finance for Couples & Buddies
shared_finance.subtitle: Collaborate on budgets, manage joint bills, and build savings together in real-time.
shared_finance.bullet1: Invite friends or couples to your room instantly
shared_finance.bullet2: Real-time socket notifications for invites & responses
shared_finance.bullet3: Unified transaction logs and shared budget meters

download_cta.title: Start Your Financial Journey Today
download_cta.subtitle: Download CuanBuddy and take full control of your money. Free on Android and iOS.
